provider.label: Defect-sheet engine
provider.mockTooltip: Demo mode — defect sheets are generated deterministically, not by a live LLM.

analysis.title: Upload & analysis
analysis.meta: Drop a concrete inspection photo. The classifier flags crack / no-crack with a confidence score, then a structured defect sheet is generated.
analysis.dropHint: JPG or PNG · a single concrete surface, deck, wall or pier
analysis.noSheetHint: The surface was classified as sound — no defect sheet is generated.

tips.confidence: Model confidence in the predicted class. Below ~0.7 the image should be re-shot or reviewed by an inspector.
tips.regions: Approximate regions the model weighted most heavily. Indicative only — not a calibrated measurement.

portfolio.title: Portfolio dashboard
portfolio.meta: Overview of the supervised structures: inspection coverage, defect detection rate and severity, with the highest-risk assets surfaced first.

tips.defectRate: Share of analyzed images classified as cracked across all structures.
tips.risk: Composite 0–100 risk score weighting severity and defect rate. ≥70 critical, ≥40 action required.
tips.severityMix: Distribution of detected defects by severity across the portfolio.
tips.topRisk: Structures ranked by composite risk score. Click a bar to inspect the structure.
